steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: 'Nonetheless' signals a contrast: despite expert advice for complicated passwords, people choose something else. The blank must describe what people actually gravitate toward, as illustrated by '123456789' being the third most common password.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "creative": Contradicts the point — '123456789' is common and unimaginative, not creative. ✗
  • "useful": A password used by millions may be convenient, but the evidence supports popularity, not usefulness. ✗
  • "complex": Contradicts the contrast with expert advice for complicated passwords. ✗
  • "popular": Ranking as the third most commonly used password is direct evidence that people choose it widely, i.e., it is popular. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
